name: 1414 Degrees Limited
analysis: 14D's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 27% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.1200, stop A$0.0634, target A$0.1650 (0.79:1) — then trail it.
